changelog: Work now includes the main working dashboard with exact personal and team time summaries
The left navigation is simplified to Work, Tickets, Clients, Reports, and Settings
Reports are reorganized into Time overview, Billing review, and Published reports
Time overview shows exact worked minutes; invoice rounding is limited to explicit billing review
Settings now use compact section cards instead of duplicate horizontal admin menus
Time overview now shows concrete work log rows with agent, ticket, client, note, and exact tracked time
Self-hosted report summary styling is restored so report metrics render as cards instead of plain text
The visual system is cleaned up across app shell, ticket detail, reports, login, attachments, and command palette
Decorative blur, glow, heavy shadows, and inconsistent fallback boxes are replaced by shared design tokens
Image preview now handles empty image sources safely, preventing broken image placeholders and unnecessary browser requests
Work dashboard now includes the Active now KPI and a seven-day activity chart with per-agent details
Hidden help panel state no longer creates horizontal overflow in generated screenshot smoke checks
Release metadata and self-hosted screenshot evidence are aligned with the current 0.3.135 release
